title: Visa Card Security and Fraud Protection
content: Visa provides comprehensive fraud protection: 1) Zero liability for unauthorized transactions, 2) Advanced encryption for online transactions, 3) Real-time fraud monitoring, 4) Secure authentication methods. If you suspect fraudulent activity: 1) Check your recent transactions immediately, 2) Report any suspicious activity to your card issuer, 3) Do not share your card details with anyone. Your card issuer will investigate and may issue a replacement card if needed. Keep your card secure and never disclose your PIN to anyone.
